brand.description: Avelon Motion is a Budapest-based AI video production studio creating cinematic brand films, motion design, and AI-generated visual systems for modern brands worldwide.

about.label: Our Story
about.headline: Pixels with purpose.
about.description: Avelon Motion combines cutting-edge AI technology with human creativity to build visual systems that adapt, evolve, and stay true to your brand's unique voice. We're designers and technologists who craft scalable content solutions without compromising on quality or artistry.

feature1.title: AI-Powered Production
feature1.description: Cutting-edge artificial intelligence that enhances creativity without replacing human artistry.

feature2.title: Scalable Solutions
feature2.description: Visual systems that grow with your brand and adapt to your evolving needs.

feature3.title: Immersive Experiences
feature3.description: Digital content that blurs the line between reality and imagination.

about.quote: We don't replace creativity. We accelerate it.

services.label: What We Do
services.headline: Services Built for Modern Brands
services.subheadline: Cutting-edge solutions that transform your brand vision into reality.
services.tags1: AI VIDEO · CONCEPT / MOTION · ART DIRECTION

service1.title: Cinematic AI Films
service1.description: We turn brand ideas into high-impact video content. From concept to delivery, we create compelling visual stories that engage your audience and scale with your needs.
service1.tags: UGC Content · Product Showcase · Marketing Campaign

service2.title: Dynamic Visual Systems
service2.description: Create dynamic visual systems that adapt to your brand needs. Our AI-powered design tools generate unique, scalable assets that grow with your business.
service2.tags: Brand Assets · Motion Design · Visual Identity

service3.title: AI-Generated Brand Personas
service3.description: Bring your brand to life with custom digital personalities. Create memorable interactions that build emotional connections with your customers.
service3.tags: Digital Avatars · Content Creation · Brand Voice

work.label: Selected Work
work.headline: SELECTED
work.subheadline: A curated look at what we build—cinematic AI content across every format, from social to brand.
work.bodyText: Every frame intentional. Every format an opportunity.
work.bodyTextBold: We blend AI-driven production with human direction to deliver work that scales without sacrificing craft.

project1.title: Social Media — UGC
project1.result: Authentic creator-style content, produced at scale with AI direction and rapid turnaround.

project2.title: AI Video Production — Short Films
project2.result: Narrative-driven AI short films for brand storytelling, festival submissions, and campaign launches.

project3.title: Marketing — Production
project3.result: Full-cycle production for product launches, performance campaigns, and multi-channel rollouts.

project4.title: AI Animation — 3D
project4.result: AI-assisted 3D animation for product visualization, explainers, and motion brand assets.

project5.title: AI Photography — Brand
project5.result: Photorealistic AI-generated brand imagery—consistent, ownable, and produced without a studio shoot.

project6.title: Brand Identity — Motion
project6.result: Full motion brand systems—logo animations, reels, and dynamic assets built for digital-first presentation.

process.label: How We Work
process.headline: HOW WE WORK
process.subheadline: A tuned sequence: research, concept, AI-generated imagery, directed motion, careful finishing—every detail clicking into place.
process.statementLine2: Each phase builds on the last—concept, creation, refinement, delivery.

step1.title: Concept & Strategy
step1.rest: AND GOALS. WE DEFINE THE NARRATIVE, STYLE DIRECTION, AND HOW AI WILL AMPLIFY YOUR MESSAGE.

step2.title: AI Generation
step2.rest: AND MOTION DIRECTIONS. WE ITERATE RAPIDLY UNTIL IT PERFECTLY CAPTURES YOUR BRAND VOICE.

step3.title: Production & Refinement
step3.rest: EVERY FRAME CRAFTED TO ENGAGE. WE ASSEMBLE THE NARRATIVE AND REFINE UNTIL IT SINGS.

step4.title: Delivery & Optimization
step4.rest: OPTIMIZED FOR PERFORMANCE. FINAL RENDERS FOR WEB, SOCIAL, AND BROADCAST. READY TO LAUNCH.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheadline: Everything you need to know about our process, pricing, and deliverables.

q1.question: What is AI video production, and how does it work?
q1.answer: AI video production combines cutting-edge artificial intelligence with cinematic storytelling. We use AI to enhance creativity, streamline production workflows, and create scalable visual content that maintains artistic quality.

q2.question: What input materials do you need to start a project?
q2.answer: We typically work with your brand guidelines, moodboards, scripts, or even just a concept. Our AI-powered tools can generate initial visuals from brand descriptions.

q3.question: How long does a typical AI video project take?
q3.answer: Most AI video productions range from 2-6 weeks. This includes concept development, AI generation, refinement, and final delivery.

q4.question: What deliverables are included in a project?
q4.answer: You'll receive the final video files in multiple formats (web, social media, broadcast-ready), source assets, brand guidelines if created, and usage rights.

q5.question: Who owns the rights to the final videos and brand assets?
q5.answer: Upon final payment, you own all rights to the deliverables. You can use the content across all your marketing channels and modify it as needed.

q6.question: Can you work with our existing brand style or create something completely new?
q6.answer: Absolutely. We can perfectly match your existing brand guidelines or create an entirely new visual identity.

q7.question: How is pricing structured for AI video projects?
q7.answer: Our pricing is project-based and varies depending on scope, complexity, and deliverables. Contact us for a personalized proposal.

q8.question: Do you provide ongoing support after project completion?
q8.answer: Yes. We offer post-project support packages for clients who need ongoing updates, additional variations, or asset modifications.
